'''ân-k-g''' ('''kanakag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luv|luv]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luv|luv]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-k-g
|-
! Lemma
| kanakag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinakag|thinakag]] || [[word:jinakag|jinakag]] || [[word:shinakag|shinakag]] || [[word:kinakag|kinakag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunakag|thuthunakag]] || [[word:jujunakag|jujunakag]] || [[word:shushunakag|shushunakag]] || [[word:kukunakag|kukunakag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunakag|thunakag]] || [[word:junakag|junakag]] || [[word:shunakag|shunakag]] || [[word:kunakag|kunakag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunakag|thunakag]] || [[word:junakag|junakag]] || [[word:shunakag|shunakag]] || [[word:kunakag|kunakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenakag|thenakag]] || [[word:jenakag|jenakag]] || [[word:shenakag|shenakag]] || [[word:kenakag|kenakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonakag|thothonakag]] || [[word:jojonakag|jojonakag]] || [[word:shoshonakag|shoshonakag]] || [[word:kokonakag|kokonakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonakag|thonakag]] || [[word:jonakag|jonakag]] || [[word:shonakag|shonakag]] || [[word:konakag|konakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonakag|thonakag]] || [[word:jonakag|jonakag]] || [[word:shonakag|shonakag]] || [[word:konakag|konakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnakag|thĂŠnakag]] || [[word:jĂŠnakag|jĂŠnakag]] || [[word:shĂŠnakag|shĂŠnakag]] || [[word:kĂŠnakag|kĂŠnakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanakag|thathanakag]] || [[word:jajanakag|jajanakag]] || [[word:shashanakag|shashanakag]] || [[word:kakanakag|kakanakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanakag|thanakag]] || [[word:janakag|janakag]] || [[word:shanakag|shanakag]] || [[word:kanakag|kanakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanakag|thanakag]] || [[word:janakag|janakag]] || [[word:shanakag|shanakag]] || [[word:kanakag|kanakag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanakag|shanakag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanakag|goshanakag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanakag|gokishanakag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanakagnĂŒ|shanakagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanakagnknĂŒ|goshanakagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakagnĂŒ|gokishanakagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanakagshĂ«|shanakagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanakagnkshĂ«|goshanakagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanakagshĂ«|gokishanakagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakagro|shanakagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakagnkro|goshanakagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakagro|gokishanakagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakagmu|shanakagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakagnkmu|goshanakagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakagmu|gokishanakagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanakagsher|shanakagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanakagnksher|goshanakagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanakagsher|gokishanakagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanakagng|shanakagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanakagnkng|goshanakagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanakagng|gokishanakagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanakagya|shanakagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanakagnkya|goshanakagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanakagya|gokishanakagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanakagyam|shanakagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanakagnkyam|goshanakagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanakagyam|gokishanakagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakagnĂŒshĂ«|shanakagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanakagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanakagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakagnĂŒro|shanakagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakagnknĂŒro|goshanakagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakagnĂŒro|gokishanakagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakagnĂŒmu|shanakagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakagnknĂŒmu|goshanakagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakagnĂŒmu|gokishanakagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakagshĂ«nĂŒ|shanakagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanakagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanakagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakagshĂ«ro|shanakagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakagnkshĂ«ro|goshanakagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakagshĂ«ro|gokishanakagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakagshĂ«mu|shanakagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakagnkshĂ«mu|goshanakagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakagshĂ«mu|gokishanakagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakagronĂŒ|shanakagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakagnkronĂŒ|goshanakagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakagronĂŒ|gokishanakagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakagroshĂ«|shanakagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakagnkroshĂ«|goshanakagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakagroshĂ«|gokishanakagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakagromu|shanakagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakagnkromu|goshanakagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakagromu|gokishanakagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakagmunĂŒ|shanakagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakagnkmunĂŒ|goshanakagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakagmunĂŒ|gokishanakagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakagmushĂ«|shanakagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakagnkmushĂ«|goshanakagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakagmushĂ«|gokishanakagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakagmuro|shanakagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakagnkmuro|goshanakagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakagmuro|gokishanakagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a27364f}}
